GN[19x19 ladder challenge: stalkor vs ObieTwice]
C[ObieTwice: I hope you enjoy it. Thank you for the game.
stalkor: of course i will! feel free to ask any questions during the game and take your time for each move
C[ObieTwice: Thank you. I think I am considered a fast player for this site. I am still a rather new player.
C[ObieTwice: dank u. ik spreek geen Nederlands. ik probeer te spreken.
C[stalkor: Oh? Waarom probeer je nederlands te leren?
C[ObieTwice: ik heb altijd geleefd in de Verenigde Staten. ik wil leren envoudige communicatie in alle talen.
ObieTwice: I hope I am at least close enough that you can read it. :)

C[stalkor: The translation was good, i understood it well:) dutch is a very annoying language to learn since it has a ton of dumb exceptions grammatically. If you didnt use google translate its very good:)
C[ObieTwice: i used the internet to look up vocabulary and tried to piece it together myself. i felt silly doing it because it was so unfamiliar.
C[ObieTwice: and the game was going so well...
ObieTwice: I don't want to rush into this next move. Although I suspect my next move will probably either be to cry or to resign. lol...
C[ObieTwice: You had me beat anyway. Probably by at least 20. But at least it was close before you invaded at M18.
ObieTwice: But now I am down about 50 and I am not sure there is anywhere to recover them.
C[stalkor: Its kinda funny how i completely derped up on the left and let you live there. Its been my game for a while since you let me make a huge framework
C[ObieTwice: I am not good enough with board position awareness to see when I am losing that early. (which is probably why i did not try to stop you from developing such a framework)
